summary: Scheduled Health Reports CRUD feature fully tested. Backend: 12/12 tests pass - all CRUD operations work correctly (POST, GET, PUT toggle, DELETE). Frontend: All UI elements verified - Overview/Scheduled Reports tabs, New Monthly Schedule form with scope toggle and quick-pick chips, schedule list with toggle/delete buttons, detail page with Send Report button.

minor.issue: Invalid ObjectId format causes 500 Internal Server Error instead of 400 Bad Request. Should validate ObjectId format before querying DB

action_items: Minor: Add ObjectId format validation in POST /api/account-health/schedules to return 400 instead of 500 for invalid IDs
critical_code_review_comments: account_health.py lines 691-739: create_schedule endpoint properly validates scope, checks target existence, creates schedule document with all fields
account_health.py lines 742-755: list_schedules returns all schedules sorted by created_at desc with proper datetime serialization
account_health.py lines 758-773: update_schedule only allows whitelisted fields (active, recipient_email, recipient_name, note)
account_health.py lines 776-783: delete_schedule properly removes schedule and returns 404 for non-existent
account_health.py lines 786-891: run_monthly_health_reports scheduler function checks last day of month before sending
account-health.tsx: Well-structured tab-based UI with Overview and Scheduled Reports tabs
account-health.tsx: New schedule form with scope toggle (Individual/Organization), quick-pick chips from loaded accounts, proper form fields
account-health.tsx: Schedule list shows toggle switch (green=active), delete button, target info, email, note, last sent status
account-health/[id].tsx: Detail page with comprehensive health metrics, Send Report button with modal, period toggle

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI features verified via Playwright

seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test schedule during UI testing. All test schedules cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Scheduled Health Reports feature complete. Backend CRUD: POST creates schedule (requires scope user/org, target_id, recipient_email), GET lists all, PUT updates allowed fields (active, email, name, note), DELETE removes schedule. Frontend has tabs, New Monthly Schedule form appears on Scheduled Reports tab with scope toggle, quick-pick account chips, and form fields. Schedule list shows toggle/delete controls. Schedule runs on last day of month via APScheduler (22:00 UTC). Email sending uses Resend - domain not verified in preview env.

features_verified.backend_create_schedule: PASS - POST /api/account-health/schedules creates schedule with all fields
features_verified.backend_list_schedules: PASS - GET /api/account-health/schedules returns list sorted by created_at desc
features_verified.backend_validation: PASS - Invalid scope returns 400, non-existent user returns 404
features_verified.frontend_tabs: PASS - Overview and Scheduled Reports tabs visible and navigable
features_verified.frontend_new_schedule_button: PASS - 'New Monthly Schedule' button on Scheduled Reports tab
features_verified.frontend_scope_toggle: PASS - Individual/Organization toggle buttons in form
features_verified.frontend_quick_pick_chips: PASS - Account chips with health scores for quick selection
features_verified.frontend_schedule_form: PASS - User ID, Recipient Email, Note fields with Cancel/Schedule buttons
features_verified.frontend_schedule_creation: PASS - Form submission creates schedule, toast shows 'Monthly report scheduled!'
features_verified.frontend_schedule_list: PASS - Created schedule appears with toggle switch and delete button
features_verified.frontend_overview_icons: PASS - Paper-plane (send) and calendar (schedule) icons on each account row
features_verified.frontend_detail_page: PASS - Health banner, metrics grid, touchpoint breakdown, Send Report button

mocked_apis.Resend Email: MOCKED - Domain send.imonsocial.com not verified in preview environment
